emails.subject: Your Review
emails.body: Your Review With Danny is scheduled Monday from 2:00 until 3:00. Should I call Julie and reschedule? Thank you, Ricki

emails.body: Re: Your Review Yes please explain that 8 need Dr signature so she can start preschool Tues. Besides Fri and Mon afternoons I don't have any other planned time off Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
